content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Minimax Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1288/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers n and m, the number of rows and columns in the grid. The next n lines contain m integers each, representing the grid.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of moves required to reach the target.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a breadth-first search (BFS) algorithm to explore all possible moves from the starting position and keep track of the minimum number of moves required to reach the target.
